stemHtml:
What is the appropriate action by ATC in the case of a single CPDLC message failure regarding a clearance to climb to FL70?

1. Transmit “ALL STATIONS, CPDLC complete failure. All communication will revert to voice.”
2. Try to send the single CPDLC message again
3. Transmit that the single CPDLC message failed and clear the aircraft to climb via radio
4. Transmit “ALL STATIONS complete failure, stop sending CPDLC.”
